summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was inferred. Non-security open PRs are retained as independent backlog items because they either need maintainer review, proof, branch refresh, or review-bot follow-up. Security-sensitive route-only refs are quarantined without poisoning unrelated items.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR, but not closable or mergeable in this plan shard.
Independent open PR with actionable review/proof blockers; keep open for author or maintainer follow-up.
The PR is a plausible bug fix but has clear correctness blockers, so keep it independent rather than close or merge.
Independent hardening/bugfix PR; keep open because proof is failing and merge/fix actions are disallowed.
Focused useful PR, but it has proof, branch-refresh, and review-bot cleanup blockers.
Keep as an independent UI PR; do not infer supersession from limited related closed-PR context.
Strong independent merge-review candidate, but merge is blocked in plan mode and by job frontmatter.
Quarantine this exact security-sensitive PR; continue unrelated classifications.
Closed but security-sensitive route-only context; quarantine without mutation.
Independent maintainer-review candidate; keep open rather than close or merge from this plan shard.
